title: Add a Toast notification component to the design system

facts.text: Frontend is React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind, shared UI lives in the @planboard/ui package.
Component name is Toast, importable from @planboard/ui.
Must support 4 variants: success, error, warning, info, each with its own icon and color.
Toasts auto-dismiss after 5 seconds by default, overridable per toast.
Would like an optional action button (e.g. Undo).
Multiple toasts should stack vertically, newest on top.
Must be accessible -- new toasts announced to screen readers via aria-live.
Would like a manual close (x) button.
Variant colors must match the existing design tokens in tailwind.config.js.
Would like a Storybook story added for each variant.

ambiguities: Which screen corner toasts should appear in.
Whether toasts should be dismissible by swipe on mobile.
The maximum number of simultaneously visible toasts.
Whether toasts persist across route/page navigation.
latent: @planboard/ui is consumed by two other internal apps that do not pin exact versions, so a breaking prop-API change would silently break their builds.
The dashboard, including Toast, must remain fully functional with animations disabled for customers running prefers-reduced-motion.
